_comment: Feature tracking adapted to MCP-RAG minimal architecture. Keep this JSON authoritative for verification status.

steps: Ingest scoped test content
Search with min-score and scope parameters
Verify non-empty expected result

features.description: MCP server responds over streamable HTTP and stdio
steps: Start Docker stack
Call initialize on /mcp with valid Accept headers
Verify initialize response payload
features.notes: Codex should use streamable_http or stdio config.

steps: Ingest alpha and beta data
Query in alpha/dev strict scope
Verify no beta/prod leakage
Run strict mode and verify no expansion
Run custom mode with explicit env include
Run auto mode for release/rollback intent

features.description: Temporal filters and latest-fact resolution behave correctly
steps: Ingest fact versions with event_time/fact_key
Search with event_time_at cutoff
Verify latest-wins and cutoff behavior

features.description: Multi-level evaluation scripts pass locally and in Docker
steps: Run local eval levels
Run Docker scoped smoke script
Verify all checks pass
features.notes: Docker script includes container readiness wait.

features.description: Incremental GitHub repository sync ingests stack-aware context into RAG
steps: Configure tracked repositories in repos.config.json
Run rag-sync-repos and verify upsert/delete counters
Validate scheduled workflow commits updated DB/state artifacts

features.description: Cognitive memory core components implemented with tests (models, ports, service, adapters)
steps: Validate cognitive models and ports are available
Run cognitive scorer tests
Run cognitive service orchestration tests
features.notes: Core exists with runtime wiring enabled in CLI and MCP entrypoints.

features.description: Agent memory ops skill for proper CLI/MCP memory usage and git-history investigations
steps: Generate intent-aware plan via rag-memory-plan
Expose MCP tool rag_memory_plan for agent orchestration
Ingest git process history via scripts/skills/mcp_rag_memory_ops/git_history_ingest.py

features.description: Business-aligned multi-repo RAG data platform (segmented shards + on-demand retrieval)
steps: Define production repository catalog by stack/language
Decide data-plane strategy: GitHub segmented repos vs hybrid with Hugging Face
Add acceptance metrics (cost, freshness SLA, retrieval latency, reconstruction guarantees)
Connect cognitive cycle and segmented retrieval flow in default runtime path

features.description: Native integration with MiniMax LLM API and MiniMax MCP web search tools
steps: Call MiniMax compatible Anthropic endpoint directly without SDK
Spawn MiniMax MCP subprocess for web search capabilities
Use CLI commands rag-ask, rag-chat, rag-web-ask to prompt the model

features.description: High-performance semantic AST code chunker in Rust with Python wrapper and auto-index daemon
steps: Parse code using tree-sitter locally with Rust binary
Generate semantic blocks for continuous delivery into vector database
Run daemon thread on startup based on RAG_AUTO_INDEX_CODE env flag

features.description: Indexación por símbolos con IDs estables y recuperación O(1) por byte offsets
steps: Extraer símbolos por lenguaje (Python, JS/TS, Go, Rust)
Generar stable symbol IDs (file_path::qualified_name#kind)
Persistir offsets en índice JSON y recuperar snippets por seek()
Exponer operaciones index/search/get/outline
features.notes: P0 completado. P1 y P2 se continúan en issues #3 y #2.

features.description: Arquitectura de servicios LLM con soporte para múltiples proveedores (OpenRouter, DeepSeek, MiniMax y CLI)
steps: Definir interface LLMProvider abstraída
Implementar adaptadores para OpenRouter y DeepSeek
Configurar selección dinámica vía RAG_LLM_PROVIDER
Asegurar fallback seguro entre proveedores

features.description: Integración con agentes CLI headless (Codex, Gemini CLI, Qwen CLI)
steps: Detectar disponibilidad de binarios CLI en el PATH
Implementar wrapper para ejecución de comandos y captura de output
Manejar graceful fallback para binario no encontrado
features.notes: Fail-soft silencioso con registro mínimo en stderr al perder binario.

features.description: Registro automático del estado del proyecto y milestones en memoria RAG
steps: Detectar cambios en features.json automáticamente
Ingerir hitos completados como Semantic Facts (L3)
Permitir que agentes consulten el Project State vía rag-memory-plan
features.notes: Mantiene a los agentes sincronizados con el progreso real.

verification_commands.memory_plan_cli: python -m cerebro_python rag-memory-plan -q "investiga historial de auth" --project-id alpha --environment-id dev
